results.action: Verify that the launcher home screen shows a large serif clock with an AM/PM suffix in the top-right corner, with a date line beneath it
results.comment: Clock '4:48 PM' rendered top-right in Newsreader serif; '84° Partly Cloudy · Sun · Jul 5' beneath with sun dot.

results.action: Verify that a grid of app cards is visible below the header and one card has an amber focus ring
results.comment: 4x4 grid of 16 apps (4 real + 12 test dummies installed to overflow the viewport); first card focused with amber ring and glow.

results.action: Press the D-pad down key repeatedly (up to 8 times) until focus reaches the bottom row of the app grid
results.comment: 3 presses reached row 4 of 4; grid scrolled to keep the focused row in view.

results.action: Verify that the large clock header is no longer visible on screen (it scrolled away with the content)
results.comment: No clock/weather visible anywhere at bottom scroll position — header scrolled off with the content.

results.action: Verify that app cards extend to the top region of the screen where the header used to be (the scroll surface covers the full screen)
results.comment: Row 1 cards clipped by the physical top edge of the display (y=0) — the scroll viewport is the full screen, not a sub-region.

results.action: Press the D-pad up key repeatedly (up to 8 times) until focus reaches the top row of the app grid
Verify that the large serif clock header is visible again in the top-right corner
results.comment: Header fully restored ('4:49 PM', weather, date) with first card focused.
